summary: Iteration 43: Phase 1 Refinements Backend Testing - 13/13 tests PASSED (100%). All 5 requested features verified working correctly.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing skipped per request (React Native/Expo app, not web frontend)

critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (Implant Site Auto-Population): PASS - POST /api/procedures/{id}/implant-plan correctly auto-populates implant_site field from tooth positions (line 1599 in server.py)

Feature 2 (Clinical Examination Fields): PASS - GET /api/procedures/{id} returns full document including all clinical examination fields (edentulous_sites, ridge_contour, soft_tissue_thickness, keratinized_mucosa, occlusal_scheme, parafunction_habit, vertical_dimension, opposing_dentition, smile_line, gingival_biotype, medical_assessment, medical_risk_level)
Feature 3 (Procedure List): PASS - GET /api/procedures returns procedure list properly with all required fields
Feature 4 (Login with Email Field): PASS - POST /api/auth/login works correctly with email field (accepts both email and username)
Feature 5 (Implant Plan Response): PASS - POST /api/procedures/{id}/implant-plan returns correct response with message and count fields

success_rate.frontend: N/A (skipped per request - React Native app)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing procedures: 69c18823de2fde0ddcc9cfeb (student's procedure with implant plans), 69c1883999403ae483a60221 (pending_phase1 status)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 refinements backend fully verified. Key findings: 1) save_implant_plan endpoint (line 1594-1601) correctly sets implant_site from positions using sorted unique join. 2) get_procedure endpoint (line 993-1011) returns full MongoDB document without projection filtering. 3) Login endpoint has 5/minute rate limit per IP - tests need token caching to avoid 429 errors. 4) All clinical examination fields are stored and returned correctly. 5) Implant plan save returns {message, count} response format.

tested_features.clinical_examination_fields: PASS - All 12 fields accessible in procedure detail
tested_features.procedure_list: PASS - Returns list with id, patient_name, status fields
tested_features.login_with_email: PASS - All 3 roles (student, admin, supervisor) authenticate correctly
tested_features.implant_plan_response: PASS - Returns {message: 'Implant plan saved', count: N}

tested_endpoints.GET /api/procedures: 200 - Returns procedure list for authenticated user
tested_endpoints.GET /api/procedures/{id}: 200 - Returns full procedure document with all fields
tested_endpoints.POST /api/procedures/{id}/implant-plan: 200 - Saves implant plan, auto-populates implant_site, returns count

verified_code_locations.implant_site_auto_population: server.py line 1599: implant_site = ', '.join(sorted(set(imp['position'] for imp in implant_docs)))
verified_code_locations.full_document_return: server.py line 993-1011: get_procedure returns full document without projection
